channel.title: TikTok Trends on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in TikTok Trends on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: AI Slop Floods TikTok: 60% of Content is Machine-Generated Junk
item.description: New study reveals alarming percentage of AI-generated content on TikTok and YouTube, particularly targeting children. Discover implications for creators and platforms.
